name: Thunder Mail
description:
This +2 greater resilient greater electricity-resistant chain mail is adorned with two golden thunderbolts, one along each forearm. Even on a seemingly cloudless day, you can raise your arms to the heavens and draw down a bolt of lightning upon yourself, empowering your armor and blasting your enemies.

Activate—Call Down Lightning (1 Action) (concentrate, electricity, manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Effect You conjure a bolt of electricity down onto yourself, dealing 6d6 electricity damage to all creatures in a 10-foot emanation. Additionally, for the next minute, whenever a creature touches you or hits you with a melee unarmed attack or a non-reach melee weapon attack, it takes 1d8 electricity damage.
